title: SPOTAC DNH & DD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Manager, Executive Assistant Posts
organization: Society for Promotion of Tourism, Art and Cultur (SPOTAC DNH & DD)
short_info: Society for Promotion of Tourism, Art and Cultur (SPOTAC DNH & DD) Assistant Manager / Executive Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SPOTAC DNH & DD. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the SPOTAC DNH & DD Assistant Manager / Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 40 years of age who have MBA (Tourism) or equivalent degree, Graduate Degree in any stream, and relevant work experience are eligible to apply for these Assistant Manager / Executive Assistant vacancies. The offline application process for SPOTAC DNH & DD Assistant M

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.details: Assistant Manager: MBA (Tourism) or equivalent degree OR BBA / B.Com / BA / B.Sc in Travel, Tourism & Hospitality Sector (preferable) OR MBA (Any other field). Minimum 3 years work experience in Tourism, Hospitality, Event or Administration fields. Knowledge of data entry with 30-40 wpm in English typing, MS Office (good knowledge of MS Excel), communication skills in English, Hindi and Gujarati. Executive Assistant: Graduate Degree in any stream. 1-2 years work experience. Knowledge of data entry with 30-40 wpm in English typing, MS Office (good knowledge of MS Excel), communication skills in English, Hindi and Gujarati.

salary_details.details: Assistant Manager: ₹ 40,000/- per month Executive Assistant: ₹ 20,000/- per month

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Shortlisting of eligible candidates as per criteria Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SPOTAC DNH & DD Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SPOTAC DNH & DD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the SPOTAC DNH & DD Recruitment 2026 is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Manager and Executive Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced. One vacancy is for the Assistant Manager post, and another is for the Executive Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Manager post, candidates need an MBA (Tourism) or equivalent degree, or a BBA/B.Com/BA/B.Sc in Travel, Tourism & Hospitality Sector, or an MBA in any other field. Relevant work experience is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in this recruitment is 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Executive Assistant position is ₹ 20,000/- per month. This is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting of eligible candidates based on the criteria, and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum work experience required for the Executive Assistant role?
faq.answer: For the Executive Assistant role, candidates require 1-2 years of work experience in relevant fields. This is in addition to a graduate degree in any stream.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Society for Promotion of Tourism, Art and Cultur (SPOTAC DNH & DD). Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.
